assertions.title: Page title and heading say Compare DEX Routers

steps.observed: Page loaded successfully
Title is 'Compare DEX Routers'
H1 heading shows 'Compare DEX Routers'

assertions.title: No FlashProfits or CowSwap Trader references in UI

steps.action: Navigate to app and take full-page screenshot
steps.observed: Full page shows only 'Compare DEX Routers' branding

steps.action: Search page text for 'FlashProfits' or 'CowSwap Trader'
steps.observed: document.body.innerText search returned false for both terms
name field is 'compare-dex-routers'

assertions.title: No FlashProfits or cowswap-trader references in source/config files

steps.observed: No matches found
No matches found

evidence.terminal: ripgrep search for 'FlashProfits|flashprofits|cowswap-trader|CowSwap Trader' in src/ and openapi.yaml returned no matches

steps.action: Navigate to app, select Ethereum chain
steps.observed: Ethereum (1) selected, default tokens populated

steps.action: Type 'WETH' in From field to trigger autocomplete
steps.observed: Dropdown appeared with WETH (Wrapped Ether) and logo

steps.expected: From field filled with WETH address
steps.observed: From field contains 0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2

steps.action: Type 'USDC' in To field to trigger autocomplete
steps.observed: Dropdown appeared with USDC (USDCoin) and logo

steps.expected: To field filled with USDC address
steps.observed: To field contains 0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48

steps.action: Enter amount '1' and click Compare Quotes
steps.observed: Quote results appeared with Curve quote showing 1946.758493 USDC output, auto-refresh countdown visible

assertions.title: Wallet connect populates sender and refreshes

steps.action: Inject mock ERC-6963 wallet provider via page.evaluate()
steps.observed: Mock wallet injected successfully
Wallet picker showed MockWalletCross option
Connected state shows 'MockWalletCross 0xDeAd...0001', sender field auto-filled with '0xDeAdBeEf00000000000000000000000000000001'

steps.action: Click Compare Quotes and check fetch URL
steps.observed: Fetch URL contains sender=0xDeAdBeEf00000000000000000000000000000001

assertions.title: Existing API endpoints preserved

steps.observed: 200 - {"status":"ok","requestId":"...","flags":{"curve_enabled":true,"compare_endpoint":true,"metrics_endpoint":true}}
200 - JSON with chain objects for Ethereum, Optimism, BSC, Polygon, Base, Arbitrum, Avalanche
200 - JSON with spandex (null, error) and curve (valid quote data with output, route, router details)
500 - {"error":"No providers returned a successful quote"} (Spandex provider issue, not endpoint breakage)

evidence.network: GET /health -> 200, GET /chains -> 200, GET /compare -> 200, GET /quote -> 500 (provider issue, endpoint works)

assertions.issues: /quote returns 500 because no Spandex providers returned a successful quote. This is an external provider issue, not an endpoint regression. The endpoint itself correctly processes the request and returns a structured error response.

assertions.title: No console errors during normal flows

steps.action: Navigate to app, select tokens via autocomplete, get quote, wait for auto-refresh
steps.observed: Only favicon.ico 404 error (documented as cosmetic). No JavaScript errors.

steps.action: Connect wallet and get quote with sender
steps.observed: No additional console errors after wallet connection flow
No console errors during chain switch

evidence.consoleErrors: Only: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 (Not Found) @ http://localhost:3001/favicon.ico:0' (documented cosmetic issue)

assertions.title: Auto-refreshed quotes include connected wallet as sender

steps.action: Connect mock wallet and get initial quote
steps.expected: Quote displayed with sender in URL
steps.observed: Quote displayed, URL contains sender param

steps.action: Clear fetch URL log and wait 18 seconds for auto-refresh
steps.observed: Auto-refresh request captured: /compare?...&sender=0xDeAdBeEf00000000000000000000000000000001
Quote updated from kyberswap provider to odos provider with new output amount

assertions.title: Chain switch clears stale results and stops refresh

steps.action: Get quote on Ethereum with results and auto-refresh visible
steps.observed: Quote results showing with 'Refreshing in Xs' countdown and Spandex/Curve tabs

steps.action: Take screenshot of results on Ethereum
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing results and countdown

steps.expected: Results cleared, countdown gone, tokens updated
steps.observed: Results section completely removed, no countdown visible, from/to fields updated to Base chain defaults (0x833589fCD6eDb6E08f4c7C32D4f71b54bdA02913, 0x4200000000000000000000000000000000000006)

frictions.description: agent-browser CLI sessions occasionally crash (page becomes empty document) after eval() calls or click operations, requiring session restart
frictions.resolution: Switched to Playwright MCP tools which are more stable for complex eval + interaction sequences

frictions.description: The /quote endpoint returns 500 because Spandex providers are not returning successful quotes - likely API key or rate limit issue
frictions.resolution: Not a UI or endpoint regression - external provider dependency. /compare still works because Curve is available.

summary: Tested 10 assertions: all 10 passed. Branding correctly shows 'Compare DEX Routers' everywhere with no FlashProfits/CowSwap Trader references. Token autocomplete, wallet connection, sender parameter propagation, auto-refresh, and chain switching all work correctly. Only notable issue is /quote returning 500 due to Spandex provider failures (not an endpoint regression).
